text: SQS vs Kinesis @ sttt @ wimars * SQS 1 production group, 1 consumption group * Decoupling and Asynchronous communications * No persistence of messages, no window * Kinesis designed for huge scale ingestion.. e ... and multiple consumers .. rolling window ¢ Data ingestion, Analytics, Monitoring, App Clicks
